basics.name: Teguh Prabowo Wijangkoro
basics.label: Programmer
basics.summary: Backend Developer with 5+ years of experience building and scaling RESTful APIs and microservices. Currently working with Ruby on Rails, React, TypeScript, Docker, and Datadog at Vidio. Skilled in SQL, Python, and Object-Oriented Programming.

work.name: PT VIDIO DOT COM
work.summary: Working with Ruby on Rails, React, Docker and Microservices
highlights: Developed and deployed RESTful APIs using Ruby on Rails for frontend clients and backend services
Enhanced backend application stability and performance by proactively monitoring and analyzing Datadog metrics and logs, which improved response latencies
Optimized application performance by implementing HTTP caching and Redis caching
Accelerated development cycles and CI/CD pipeline by optimizing Docker build processes and strategically utilizing layer caching
Improved test reliability and engineering efficiency by identifying and refactoring the root cause of flaky tests
Implemented frontend components for web platform using React and TypeScript
Pair Programming and TDD as day to day practice
Authored and maintained technical documentation for features and API endpoints
Use AI coding agents like Claude Code and Codex daily as core part of workflow, accelerating implementation, debugging, and code review

work.name: PT Talenta Informasi Teknologi
work.summary: Design and implement server-side features and API using FastAPI framework
highlights: Involve in database structure decision making
Integrate third party service like Firebase, Midtrans

work.name: Dian Nuswantoro University
work.summary: Assisting lecturer in Programming and Algorithm course

projects.name: SJP Backoffice
projects.description: Built with Claude Code, a back-office admin system for Sinar Jaya Pratama covering the full quotation-to-invoice-to-cash flow, expense/bill tracking, equipment and project management, and employee timesheets. Exposes an MCP server so invoicing and quotation operations can be driven directly by AI agents.
highlights: Built end-to-end with Claude Code as an AI pair-programming workflow
Exposed core invoicing/quotation operations to AI agents via an MCP server
Built Filament-based admin panel on Laravel 13 / PHP 8.3
Designed quotation, invoice, and bill workflows with payment term and clause templates, tax/discount-aware allocations, and PDF/print views
Implemented equipment-linked project tracking and employee timesheets with break-duration tracking
Added audit trail via activity logging and role-based access control

projects.name: Golek Truk
projects.description: Build backend service. An advertisement service for Shippers and Truckers related without in-application transaction between seller and buyer.
highlights: Collaborate with 1 other Backend Developer, 2 Frontend Developers, 2 Business Analysts
Design and build REST API using FastAPI framework
Design database, using MySQL
Research and integrate Firebase Authentication for authentication service
Research and integrate Midtrans for payment gateway
MongoDB for logging service
AWS S3 for uploaded file storage service
Docker for deployment
Git as Continous Integration

projects.name: Siba Promoter
projects.description: Built two backend services; (1)Interactive Web Trucker, an application for promoting Siba Group's orders to the partners via Web Application or Telegram Chat Application. (2)Backoffice, a financial application that records the transaction Interactive Web Trucker invoices and bills and generate journals and reports
highlights: Collaborate with 1 other Backend Developer, 1 Frontend Developer, 2 Business Analysts
Integrate with CarLo via database level
Design and build REST API using FastAPI framework
Design database, using MySQL
AWS S3 for uploaded file storage
Docker for deployment
Research and integrate with Telegram Bot API using python
Git as Continous Integration
